LanguageData.TravellingTransporters.label: cargo bots
LanguageData.Spaceports_ShuttleWO.description: Ένα βερίκοπουλο της Αδελφότητας εν πτήσει.
LanguageData.Spaceports_ShuttleWO.label: Vertibird της αδελφότητας
LanguageData.AsteroidMiningSite.description:
A vacstone asteroid that was towed into orbit around the planet as part of a mining operation long ago. This asteroid has only been partially mined.
This location can be reached using transport pods, shuttles, or the Hellion.
LanguageData.Gravship.label: Hellion
LanguageData.GravshipLaunch.description: The launch site of the Hellion.
LanguageData.GravshipLaunch.label: Hellion launch
LanguageData.SpaceSettlement.description:
An orbital platform controlled by another human faction. They won't appreciate visitors.
These platforms have long-range automatic weapon systems capable of destroying incoming ships. They can only safely be approached by the Hellion if it is fitted with an ECM suite.
LanguageData.RobCo_CourierCamp.description: Dočasný kuriérsky tábor viazaný na transakciu RobCo platinových čipov.
LanguageData.RobCo_CourierCamp.label: kuriérna cesta
LanguageData.RobCo_VaultSite.description: Zapečatený trezor RobCo alebo príloha správy viazaná na kuriérsku cestu s platinovým čipom.
LanguageData.RobCo_VaultSite.label: RobCo úložisko
LanguageData.VFEM2_DestroyedMerchantGuildCamp.descrip: A looted and abandoned caravan company camp.
LanguageData.VFEM2_DestroyedMerchantGuildCamp.label: destroyed caravan camp
LanguageData.VFED_TravelingDeserterShuttle.descriptio: A Brotherhood expeditionary vertibird in flight.
LanguageData.VFED_TravelingDeserterShuttle.label: Brotherhood vertibird
LanguageData.TravelingShuttle.label: vertibird
